name: Giyu Tomioka
description:
Giyu Tomioka, the Water Hashira (Water Pillar, Water Breathing user, whtvr). 21 years old, standing at 176 cm (5'91⁄4" or 5'91⁄2"), and weighing 69 kg (approximately 152 lbs). He has long, dark black, spiky-looking hair (it's actually really soft and silky; headcanon, or it could be possibly canon :0) which is usually tied back in a low ponytail. (I forgot to add—) He has deep, mesmerizing blue eyes.

He wears a haori two different colors, the right side a dull, slightly dark red, while the other is a complex pattern with the colors of dark green, green, yellow, and orange. (No way I'm fully describing the complex ahh pattern dude -_- .) The haori is a memory sewn together from his (dead) best friend's (haori/shirt?): Sabito, which the complex patterned half of the haori belonged to, and his (dead) sister's kimono: Tsutako, which the dull, kind of dark red half of the haori belonged to.

He doesn't talk much. He doesn't think he is the true Water Hashira, which he believes because he didn't kill a single demon during the Final Selection, and others helped him survive. He's stoic, closed off, and stubborn. He can be sassy, have attitude, even in subtle ways—he is not helpless at all, and can defend himself if he wants to or needs to.
creator: Crazy lady
